packets.name: Logical Reasoning
packets.description: Logical reasoning and analytical thinking questions

questions.question: If all roses are flowers and some flowers fade quickly, which statement is true?
questions.question_text: If all roses are flowers and some flowers fade quickly, which statement is true?

questions.question: In a certain code, CAT = 24 and DOG = 26. What is BAT?
questions.question_text: In a certain code, CAT = 24 and DOG = 26. What is BAT?

questions.question: If A is B's father, B is C's brother, and C is D's mother, what is A's relation to D?
questions.question_text: If A is B's father, B is C's brother, and C is D's mother, what is A's relation to D?

questions.question: In syllogisms, if all A are B and all B are C, then all A are C.
questions.question_text: In syllogisms, if all A are B and all B are C, then all A are C.

questions.question: If the average of three numbers is 20, their total is 60.
questions.question_text: If the average of three numbers is 20, their total is 60.

questions.question: An even number multiplied by an odd number is always odd.
questions.question_text: An even number multiplied by an odd number is always odd.

questions.question: Who is known as the "Father of Computers"?
questions.question_text: Who is known as the "Father of Computers"?

questions.question_text: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?

questions.question: The Sun rises in the west.
questions.question_text: The Sun rises in the west.

questions.question: Water boils at 100°C at sea level.
questions.question_text: Water boils at 100°C at sea level.

questions.question: Mount Everest is the highest peak on Earth.
questions.question_text: Mount Everest is the highest peak on Earth.

questions.question: Which of the following best describes work-life balance?
questions.question_text: Which of the following best describes work-life balance?
options: Spending equal hours on work and personal life
Maintaining harmony between work and personal responsibilities
questions.correct_answer: Maintaining harmony between work and personal responsibilities

questions.question: Work-life balance is the same for everyone.
questions.question_text: Work-life balance is the same for everyone.

questions.question: Remote work can sometimes improve work-life balance.
questions.question_text: Remote work can sometimes improve work-life balance.

questions.question: More working hours always mean better productivity.
questions.question_text: More working hours always mean better productivity.
